text:
Once upon a whimsical afternoon, little Poppy the flower bloomed wildly, its petals shimmering with an iridescent hue. Daydreaming, Poppy imagined she was a superhero. She would soar through the sky, stopping to save the sunbeams from fading.

One day, Poppy noticed something peculiar. A tiny bee was struggling to reach the last ray. With a heroic flutter, Poppy caught the sunbeam, propelling it back to its resting spot high above. Humming a merry tune, Poppy felt unstoppable.

Elsewhere in the garden, a cat named Whiskers lay curled up on a sunbed. The cat heard Poppy’s delightful humming and decided to investigate. As Whiskers approached, Poppy landed gracefully beside him, its fragrance enchanting. "Hello, friend! You look lonely," said Poppy.
